title: Sovereign IP Portfolio Manifest — Full Value Capture

detailed_value_breakdown.valuation_methodology: Golden Ratio Sovereign Valuation (GRSV) using φ-scaled multipliers based on technical novelty, market utility, and defensibility scores

notes: Version 2.0.0 expands the original portfolio seed with detailed valuations and descriptions.
All values expressed in INT-TOK (Intelligence Token) using φ-scaled notation.
IP defensibility score of 9.2/10 indicates strong protection across all layers.
Market coverage of 94.7% reflects comprehensive AI infrastructure coverage.
This manifest is attorney-grade for IP documentation and valuation purposes.
